notes: Chunk 56 (Template A, Tier B) complete 2026-06-16. 25 new routes: AT/CH to Caucasus (AM/GE/AZ/KZ x2 = 8), AT/CH to Baltic/Slovenia (EE/LV/LT/SI x2 = 8), Baltic/Slovenia to IE/PT/ES (EE/LV/LT to IE/PT, LT/SI to ES, SI to IE = 9). Sources: SSFS Armenia, USDA APHIS Georgia Feb 2026, Azerbaijan State Vet Service, KKVS Kazakhstan, BLV blv.admin.ch 2026, SI 112 of 2014 Ireland. Next: Chunk 57 (Template B, Tier B). Day 22 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
